authors: Samantha Shorey Estefania Rodriguez a University of Pittsburgh
USAb University of Texas at Austin
raw_title: Automating Essential Work: News Media and Technology Hype in a Critical Sector 2014–2024
title_en: Automating Essential Work: News Media and Technology Hype in a Critical Sector 2014–2024
title_zh: 自动化关键工作：新闻媒体与技术炒作在关键领域（2014-2024）
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了2014年至2024年间，新闻媒体如何自动化关键工作，以及技术炒作在这一过程中的作用。它分析了自动化对新闻行业的影响，并批判性地审视了技术宣传如何塑造媒体实践。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how news media automated essential work from 2014 to 2024 and the role of technology hype in this process. It analyzes the impact of automation on the journalism industry and critically looks at how tech promotion shapes media practices.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻媒体中自动化技术的应用及其社会影响，批判性分析技术炒作如何改变新闻生产和行业动态。
research_direction_en: Investigating the application of automation technologies in news media and their societal impacts, with a critical analysis of how technology hype transforms news production and industry dynamics.
